One of the Industrialists named
Hoffman, who donated $50 to the
Industrial Worker, the I. w. W.
paer and then went to Jail for five
weeks, donated an. additional 500
to the defense fund of the |. w. w.
shortly after his release today.
Evident attempts are being made
to stir up new spirit in the fight,
among those to be found about the
l. W.. w. headquarters. Some of
those who have been in Jail are
said to have severely chided those
who remained outside and de.
clared they were moral towards
to let their fellow workers" starve

ed outside in fear of police meth
